    two sisters, one squishy obsession

    our story

    welcome to our little corner of the internet! we’re two sisters who share one big love — squishies. what began as a growing collection on our shelves slowly turned into a cozy little shop we run together.

    every squishy here is one we’d happily keep for ourselves. we hunt for the softest, cutest, most satisfying ones, then tuck each order in with a little extra care — so a bit of calm and comfort lands right at your door.

    thanks for stopping by our little shop. we hope something here makes you smile. 💕
